findings.text: Approach numbering in constructor.py comments (approach 2=quad, 3=hyperbola, 1=doubly-symmetric) is inverted vs log.md table (1/2/3). Run order is correct — cosmetic only.
FLAMMENKAMP_N10 hardcoded fallback never reached; harmless but invites scrutiny.
Panel (a) 1D partition lacks an explicit axis label clarifying 'column indices 0-9 partitioned into 5 color-coded pairs'.
findings.fix: Add a subtitle or axis label on panel (a).

findings.text: Bottom row panels (d)(e)(f) not explicitly sharex/sharey.
findings.fix: Explicitly set sharex/sharey when creating subplots.

findings.issue: 927 words is at the top end of the 400-800 target band for positive results.
findings.fix: Trim ~100 words by referencing construction_proof.md for the full derivation.

findings.text: research/references/registry.yaml doesn't exist — references documented inline, functional but campaign-level gap.
FLAMMENKAMP_N10 '4-fold symmetry' comment appears incorrect; since it's never reached, doesn't affect output.

synopsis: Orbit 02 delivers a fully deterministic, search-free 20-point construction exactly at the campaign target (-20.0 on seeds 1,2,3). No random calls; constructor reproducibly generates committed POINTS. Primary value is reproducibility (no CPython RNG dependency), not metric improvement.
